args.title: Judge Swarm T3 Audit — signalhaus-website
args.content: {"repo": "signalhaus-website", "overall_score": 6.7, "scores": {"business_value": 9, "architecture": 8, "documentation": 8, "code_quality": 7, "test_coverage": 4, "security": 4}, "strengths": ["Strong business relevance as primary SignalHaus marketing funnel", "Clean Next.js App Router architecture and solid project structure", "Comprehensive deployment-focused README"], "bugs": ["In-memory rate limiting in serverless API route is bypassable", "Contact form bot-protection is insufficient", "Missing referenced static asset (logo.png)"], "risks": ["Production abuse/spam risk on contact endpoint", "Security posture mismatch for public marketing site", "Low automated test coverage increases regression probability"], "recommendations": ["Migrate rate limiting to durable backend (e.g., Upstash Redis)", "Add CAPTCHA/challenge + abuse telemetry on contact form", "Add API/component smoke tests in CI"]}

args.title: Judge Swarm T3 Audit — core-entityextraction
args.content: {"repo": "core-entityextraction", "overall_score": 7.1, "scores": {"test_coverage": 8, "business_value": 8, "security": 7, "documentation": 7, "code_quality": 6, "architecture": 6}, "strengths": ["Comprehensive API/auth/health extraction test coverage", "Useful NLP entity-extraction service with clear business utility", "Good FastAPI baseline with service-level reliability"], "bugs": ["Connection cleanup paths in persistence.py can leak resources on exceptions", "712-line main.py indicates monolithic routing/business-logic coupling", "Dead code and duplicate entity-location paths present"], "risks": ["Resource leaks can degrade availability under sustained load", "Monolith file shape slows safe iteration and onboarding", "Unnecessary duplicated logic increases divergence risk"], "recommendations": ["Refactor main.py into router/service layers", "Use try/finally connection handling in persistence functions", "Delete dead paths and unify duplicate extraction/location logic"]}

args.title: Judge Swarm T3 Audit — signal-studio-auth
args.content: {"repo": "signal-studio-auth", "overall_score": 6.3, "scores": {"business_value": 9, "test_coverage": 8, "architecture": 6, "documentation": 6, "code_quality": 5, "security": 3}, "strengths": ["Critical auth service with good platform fit", "Strong test coverage across RBAC/rate-limit/security areas", "Reasonable FastAPI structure and middleware modularization intent"], "bugs": ["Duplicate security-header middleware causes weaker headers to overwrite stricter ones", "X-Frame-Options conflict (DENY vs SAMEORIGIN) introduces clickjacking exposure", "Documentation gap for deployment/integration beyond audit notes"], "risks": ["Active production security downgrade in authentication boundary", "Clickjacking policy inconsistency may violate expected compliance posture", "Operational integration risk due to thin canonical README"], "recommendations": ["Remove duplicate inline middleware and keep single strict security-header source", "Normalize X-Frame-Options and CSP policy defaults", "Publish full README with auth flows, env vars, and deployment hardening"]}

args.content: {"repo": "Trendpilot", "overall_score": 5.1, "scores": {"test_coverage": 7, "business_value": 6, "documentation": 6, "code_quality": 5, "architecture": 5, "security": 2}, "strengths": ["Large test corpus exists as a starting quality asset", "Market fit potential in newsletter/analytics automation", "Foundational platform pieces are present"], "bugs": ["Protected APIs missing auth middleware", "SSO callback logic accepts hardcoded/unverified identity", "Heavy synchronous file I/O in request paths"], "risks": ["Critical unauthorized access/data exposure", "Authentication bypass enables account takeover vector", "Event-loop blocking and in-memory persistence threaten reliability/data durability"], "recommendations": ["Apply authGuard/apiKeyAuth consistently across all sensitive routes", "Disable or fix SAML/OAuth callbacks with strict token/signature validation", "Migrate sync file persistence to async DB-backed storage"]}
